definitions.archive_records: Inspectable records that do not clear all public evidence gates.
definitions.benchmark_controls: Position records with scoreboard_role=benchmark_control; reported separately and excluded from school rankings.
definitions.completed_review_logs: Tracked review/log/*.md excluding README.md. Internal audit notes are not counted as external peer review.
definitions.featured_evidence: Public-visible causal records without screening markers.
definitions.hypothesis_specs: Tracked hypotheses/<topic>/<id>.yaml files, excluding conditional_taxonomy and steelman.
definitions.positions: Tracked positions/*.yaml school or benchmark records, excluding underscore-prefixed derived indexes.
definitions.public_visible_results: Hypotheses passing strict registration, replication, falsification-rule, verdict, and estimator-floor gates.
definitions.reference_set: Hand-audited exemplars; not peer review and not a substitute for the evidence tier.
definitions.result_card_files: Tracked engine/runs/<id>/result_card.md files, regardless of verdict or public-visibility gate.
